                     else:

                         avg_probs += weight * probs

 

-            _, predicted = avg_probs.max(1)

-            predictions.extend(predicted.cpu().tolist())

+

 

 if __name__ == '__main__':

     main()

+    # Optimizer - only train classifier + last few transformer blocks

+    param_groups = [

+        {'params': [p for n, p in model.named_parameters() if 'blocks.11' in n or 'blocks.10' in n or 'blocks.9' in n], 'lr': args.lr},

+        {'params': [p for n, p in model.named_parameters() if 'blocks.11' not in n and 'blocks.10' not in n and 'blocks.9' not in n and 'classifier' not in n], 'lr': args.lr * 0.1},

+        {'params': model.module.classifier.parameters(), 'lr': args.lr * 10},

+    ]

+    optimizer = torch.optim.AdamW(param_groups, weight_decay=args.weight_decay)

+
